institution.name: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.2k → $15.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.9k → $37.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
